data.description:
# WS2 — Overlay catalog + code-review prompts + move-catalog

## Why
The base reviewer (WS1) escalates to SPECIALIST overlays; the gate also triggers some overlays deterministically by file globs/content. This story authors that catalog (the specialist reviewers drafted in the catalog comments on 9da1) plus the per-gate kernel plug-ins (verify preamble + Pass-4 code moves) the consumer seam requires.

## What
- The overlay catalog as code-review criteria: each overlay is a finder prompt with `applies_to` globs / content triggers (security, performance, i18n, a11y, db-migrations, docs, deps/supply-chain, api-compat, IaC, tests, llm-prompts).
- A code-review verify-prompt preamble that EMBEDS `VERIFIER_RULES_SCAFFOLD` and re-grounds against the diff.
- A code Pass-4 move-catalog: a `MOVE_REGISTRY_SCHEMA` instance (each move `{name, template, applies_when}`), e.g. extract-helper, add-regression-test, threat-model, add-migration-guard.
- A code-review criteria registry (parallel to `plan_review/registry.py`) + a `threshold_for(criteria)` resolver and `criteria_routing.json`.

## Scope
- `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-*.md` — the overlay finder prompts + the verify preamble + coach prompt.
- `src/rebar/llm/code_review/registry.py` — criteria, `applies_to`, overlay enum, threshold/posture resolver.
- `src/rebar/llm/code_review/moves.py` — the code move-catalog instance.
- OUT OF SCOPE: the escalation union + workflow wiring (WS3); the secrets/security DETECTORS (WS5) — this story authors the security overlay PROMPT, not the deterministic scanner.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each overlay is a contract-bearing front-matter finder prompt with `applies_to` globs/content triggers; all resolve via the prompt library and pass the CI drift gate.
- [ ] A code verify preamble embeds `VERIFIER_RULES_SCAFFOLD` (independence/atomicity/allow-insufficient/verdict-not-fix) and re-grounds against the diff.
- [ ] A code move-catalog validates against `MOVE_REGISTRY_SCHEMA` (load-time `validate_move_registry`), each move carrying `applies_when` triggers.
- [ ] A code-review criteria registry exposes the overlay enum + a `threshold_for(criteria) -> (block_threshold, blocking_enabled)` resolver (thresholds start high → mostly advisory in v1).
data.title: WS2: Overlay catalog + finder/verify/coach prompts + code move-catalog
